name: PirateEnhanced
description: TinyPirateStories + cosmopedia (wikihow + stories subsample), all piratized, plus gutenberg_books (5 public-domain pirate books, NOT piratized) for normal-language exposure. Equal weights concatenate; unequal weights interleave by sampling probability. Add more sources as they are registered in nanobeard/dataset_pipeline/sources.py.

sources.name: cosmopedia_stories
sources.origin: HuggingFaceTB/cosmopedia (stories subset, 1500000 subsample) piratized via arrr

sources.name: gutenberg_books
sources.origin: Project Gutenberg, NOT piratized: pyle_book_of_pirates (#973), treasure_island (#120), general_history_of_pyrates (#40580), peter_pan (#16), coral_island (#646)
